skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.name: Ceremonial Sword
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.descri: Unlocked after 3 completed tasks. Spend 150 mana to turn one knife into a Ceremonial Sword for 15 seconds and gain Speed II.
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.name: Mighty Force
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.descriptio: Spend 80 mana. For 10 seconds, an empty-hand left click knocks a player back and makes one lethal attack.
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.name: Swift Step
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.description: Spend 30 mana to gain Speed III for 5 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.name: Murder Sense
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.descriptio: Spend 60 mana to highlight players within 20 blocks who are holding dangerous items in red for 15 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.healing.name: Healing
skill.sparkwitch.healing.description: Spend 40 mana to restore 3 sanity per second to nearby innocent players for 20 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.descriptio: Spend 80 mana to highlight yourself in pale blue for 30 seconds and other living players in white for 10 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.pig_chase.name: Pig Chase
skill.sparkwitch.pig_chase.description: Spend 150 coins to enter 17 seconds of quiet Psycho chase with Speed V, wathe door blasts, and living-player highlights.
skill.sparkwitch.death_ray.name: Death Ray
skill.sparkwitch.death_ray.description: Spend 100 mana. For 10 seconds, left-click to fire 3 red rays within 12 blocks. Walls block the ray.
shop.sparkwitch.obscure.description: Obscures instinct for players outside the Witch faction for 30 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.blindness.description: Blinds players outside the Witch faction for 20 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.fear.description: For 10 seconds, blocks non-Witch players from using instinct, role skills, and shops while draining 50 sanity total.
shop.sparkwitch.heaviness.description: Applies Slowness III to players outside the Witch faction for 10 seconds.
replay.death.sparkwitch.ceremonial_blade: %s had their throat sealed by %s's §5Ceremonial Sword§r
%s had their throat sealed by a §5Ceremonial Sword§r
message.sparkwitch.skill.no_skill: You do not have a role skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.not_witch: Only SparkWitch roles can use role skills.
message.sparkwitch.skill.dead: You must be alive to use a role skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.cooldown: Your role skill is cooling down for %s seconds.
message.sparkwitch.skill.unavailable: That role skill cannot be used now.
message.sparkwitch.skill.ceremonial_swor: The Ceremonial Sword is already active.
Complete %s/%s tasks to use the Ceremonial Sword.
You need a knife to use this skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.pig_chase.no_in: You need one empty inventory slot to enter Psycho Mode.
message.sparkwitch.spell.fear.cast: Fear grips everyone outside the Witch faction.
message.sparkwitch.fear.skill_blocked: Fear prevents you from using role skills.
message.sparkwitch.fear.instinct_blocked: Fear prevents you from using instinct.
shop.error.sparkwitch.fear: Fear prevents you from buying items.
